disabled_capabilities.next_step: Generate a safe remediation plan after reviewing disabled capabilities with: node src/entrypoints/operator/capabilities.mjs list t-powers --status disabled. Immediate alternatives may be limited summary or draft preview; otherwise implement a site-specific adapter path and rerun validation. Ordinary confirmation cannot enable private-message detail, message sending, account mutation, or other forced-disabled actions.

auth_explanation_zh: 本次未使用认证采集，只构建公开页面和公开能力。
未发现缺少登录证据的候选能力。
没有认证能力被有限启用。
1 个能力因风险策略被禁用或限制。
已保存 44 个公开页面的受控页面材料，并已脱敏敏感赋值和脚本正文。
没有保存 cookie、token、Authorization header、浏览器 profile、storage 材料、原始网络 payload 或私密正文。

sensitive_read.description: Confirms only limited sanitized structure scanning; unsanitized/private material remains unsaved.

draft_write.description: Confirms draft preparation only; final submit/send actions remain disabled.

disabled.next_step: Select disabled capabilities in the post-build interaction to write capability_remediation_plan.json. Immediate entries can run only as limited summary or draft preview; adapter entries require explicit site-specific adapter validation before use.

next_steps: For disabled capabilities, write a safe remediation plan: immediate entries use limited summaries or draft previews; adapter entries need explicit site adapter validation before use.
